title: AN ACT AMENDING SUB-ITEMS (g), (i) AND (j) OF ITEM 37, SUBSECTION (e), TITLE B, AND ITEM 55, GROUP I, SUBSECTION (a), TITLE G, OF SECTION 1, REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY, ENTITLED "AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS".

chunks.text:
SEC. 2. Item 55, Group I, subsection (

a

), Title G of section one, Republic Act Numbered Nine hundred and twenty, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"55. Liloan feeder road, Maria, Negros

Oriental............................................P15,000.00"

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 10, 1955.
